label: Implement owner type
description: Defines a verb-ownership category used by the combat log and battle-log grammar systems to tag the source of a verb (weapon, hediff, bodypart, terrain, or native verb).

implementOwnerRuleName.label: Implement owner rule name
implementOwnerRuleName.description: The rule name token injected into the battle-log text grammar for this owner type. Used when formatting combat log entries such as hit with <weapon>. Absent on owner types that do not contribute a grammar rule (e.g. Bodypart, NativeVerb).

implementOwnerTypeValue.label: Implement owner type value
implementOwnerTypeValue.description: The unique lowercase token identifying this verb-owner category in text generation and combat logging contexts. Must be unique across all ImplementOwnerTypeDef instances.

basic-implement-owner-type.label: Basic implement owner type
basic-implement-owner-type.description: Minimal ImplementOwnerTypeDef with defName and implementOwnerTypeValue ready to fill.
